import sys

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    Sx, Sy, Tx, Ty = map(int, input().split())

    # Convert coordinates to tile coordinates
    def to_tile(x):
        return x // 2

    # Number of tiles crossed in x and y directions
    dx = abs(to_tile(Sx) - to_tile(Tx))
    dy = abs(to_tile(Sy) - to_tile(Ty))

    # The minimum toll is the number of tiles crossed
    print(dx + dy)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
